sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111090" key="filogewmetri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-γεωμετρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111090.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fondness for geometry,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.5k</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
